display.purpose: App name only; the one brand-scale type moment.

title.purpose: Chart, card, panel, and table titles.

body.purpose: Short explanation, empty states, and landing prose.

label.purpose: Fields, table headers, metadata, and compact categorical text.

mono.purpose: WCA IDs, solve values, ranks, attempts, dates, and tabular results.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: Main analytical panels, chart panels, metric cards, landing panels, results panels, and skeleton panels.

shadows.name: control-ambient
shadows.purpose: Lightweight emphasis such as comparison record panels.

motion.name: skeleton-shimmer
motion.purpose: Loading dashboard panels; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: state-change
motion.value: state changes only; no page choreography defined
motion.purpose: Buttons, tabs, hover rows, and form focus should respond without decorative entrance motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 42px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--btn-bg, #2563eb); color: var(--btn-text, #ffffff); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-weight: 760; padding: 0 18px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-2, #1d6fff); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--focus-ring, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.16)); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.56; }

components.name: Utility Button
components.description: Theme toggle, recent search chip, pagination, or secondary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-utility { min-height: 34px; border: 1px solid var(--border-3, #d9dee5); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--panel, #ffffff); color: var(--text, #2d3239); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 760; padding: 0 12px; } .ds-btn-utility:hover { border-color: var(--accent-2, #1d6fff); color: var(--accent, #2563eb); } .ds-btn-utility:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--focus-ring, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.16)); } .ds-btn-utility:disabled { cursor: default; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: WCA ID Input
components.description: Uppercase WCA ID entry field with validation states.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: var(--label, #5e6673); font: inherit; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 760; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 42px; border: 1px solid var(--border-3, #d9dee5); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--field, #ffffff); color: var(--heading, #181b20); font: inherit; outline: none; padding: 12px 14px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent-2, #1d6fff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--focus-ring, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.16)); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-2, #6b7280); }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Compact performance stat with label, value, and optional detail.
components.css: .ds-metric { min-height: 112px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e5e9); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--panel, #ffffff); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px var(--shadow, rgba(24, 27, 32, 0.05)); color: var(--text, #2d3239); padding: 18px; } .ds-label { margin: 0 0 8px; color: var(--label, #5e6673); font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-value { margin: 0; color: var(--heading, #181b20); font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 650; line-height: 1.05; } .ds-detail { margin: 5px 0 0; color: var(--muted, #626b77); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Event Tabs
components.description: Wrapped event selector with blue active state.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e5e9); } .ds-tab { width: auto; min-height: 32px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border-3, #d9dee5); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--panel, #ffffff); color: var(--label, #5e6673); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 760; } .ds-tab:hover { border-color: var(--accent-2, #1d6fff); color: var(--accent, #2563eb); } .ds-tab-active { border-color: var(--accent, #2563eb); background: var(--accent, #2563eb); color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Compact mode switch for chart aggregation.
components.css: .ds-segmented { display: inline-grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(38px, auto)); gap: 3px; padding: 3px; border: 1px solid var(--border-4, #dfe4ea); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--segmented-bg, #f2f5f9); } .ds-segmented button { min-height: 28px; padding: 0 9px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #626b77); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 800; } .ds-segmented button:hover { color: var(--accent, #2563eb); } .ds-segmented .ds-active { background: var(--panel, #ffffff); color: var(--accent, #2563eb); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px var(--shadow-2, rgba(24, 27, 32, 0.09)); }

components.name: Results Table
components.description: Dense official round results with horizontal scrolling and mono values.
components.css: .ds-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e5e9); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--panel, #ffffff); } .ds-table { width: 100%; min-width: 560px; border-collapse: collapse; color: var(--text, #2d3239); font: inherit; font-size: 0.86rem; } .ds-table th, .ds-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-2, #edf0f3); padding: 11px 12px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; } .ds-table th { color: var(--label, #5e6673); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 820; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--hover, #f4f7fb); } .ds-table td span { display: block; color: var(--muted-2, #6b7280); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 650; } .ds-result { font-family: var(--font-geist-mono), SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace; font-weight: 650; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Dashed neutral placeholder for missing chart or table data.
components.html: No official round results for this event.
components.css: .ds-empty { min-height: 200px; display: grid; place-items: center; margin: 0; border: 1px dashed var(--border-4, #dfe4ea); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--muted, #626b77); font: inherit; font-weight: 650; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }

narrative.overview:
Cubestats should feel like a precise competition logbook made interactive: compact, factual, fast to scan, and built around official WCA evidence. It is not a business-intelligence dashboard wearing speedcubing labels; it is a specialist analysis surface where PBs, averages, ranks, dates, attempts, and DNF markers stay close to the user's hand.

The visual system is restrained product UI: cool light neutrals, a single blue action and selection color, low ambient elevation, 8px corners, dense grids, and stable native controls. Dark mode mirrors the same structure with deeper neutral panels and a softer blue accent. Personality comes from WCA-specific language, real competitor examples, tabular solve detail, and chart semantics, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained blue-on-neutral palette with semantic success and danger states.
Dense but legible analytics cards, charts, tabs, tables, and heatmaps.
One sans family for UI and one mono family for result values and WCA IDs.
8px geometry across controls, panels, tabs, chips, and empty states.
Shadows are quiet and structural; data hierarchy carries the interface.

rules.name: The Blue Means Current Rule
rules.body: Use Competition Blue only for primary action, current selection, chart focus, and active data state. Do not wash the whole UI in blue.

rules.name: The No Beige Analytics Rule
rules.body: The workspace background is cool neutral, not cream, sand, ivory, or paper. Warm editorial backgrounds make the app feel generated and less analytical.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Green means success or better performance; red means error. Do not use either as ornament.

rules.name: The Data Gets the Mono Rule
rules.body: Use mono for values that need scanning or comparison. Do not put navigation, buttons, or prose in mono for flavor.

rules.name: The Fixed Product Scale Rule
rules.body: Use fixed rem sizes and responsive breakpoints. Do not introduce fluid viewport typography for dashboard panels.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Every analytical surface earns structure with a 1px border before it earns a shadow.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Do not combine bigger soft shadows with decorative borders. The existing shadow vocabulary is already the ceiling.

dos: Do keep Cubestats in the product register: fast lookup, comparison, event drilldown, and data inspection come before presentation.
Do use Competition Blue for primary action, selected state, and chart focus only.
Do preserve dense analytics where density helps speedcubers compare official results.
Do keep tables and charts readable on small screens with horizontal scrolling and structural breakpoints.
Do use WCA-specific terms directly: PB, Ao5, DNF, WCA ID, Kinch, Sum of Ranks, single, average, round, attempt.
Do keep 8px as the default radius for controls and panels.
Do use skeleton loading for dashboard content instead of centered spinners.
donts: Don't make Cubestats feel like a generic corporate dashboard.
Don't make it feel like a KPI reporting suite.
Don't make it feel like a gamified toy.
Don't ship obvious AI slop: decorative analytics cliches, inflated SaaS hero patterns, generic card grids, vague insights language, or ornamental gradients.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative side stripes, oversized rounded cards, or repeating stripe backgrounds.
Don't invent non-standard form controls, tabs, tables, or modals for flavor.
Don't use green, red, or blue as decoration when they are not carrying state or data meaning.
